creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Please show us output of `ifconfig bge0' 
Also, can you please check if you still experience errors when disabling 
jumbo frames, checksum offloading and if setting hw.bce.msi_enable to another 
value (0) makes any difference? 
This appears to be most likely a DUP or related to PR kern/100858.
